_meta.note: Only runtime-ready scenes with verified chapter gates ship; the new pack remains disabled unless explicitly allowlisted.

runtime_policy.chapter_gate: Never fetch a scene before a verified start chapter. research_hold scenes remain disabled.
runtime_policy.playback: Play once on entering close range, then hold the authored final frame.
runtime_policy.backward_scrub: Reset scene time, actors, pose selection, and effects deterministically.
runtime_policy.reduced_motion: Use the final safe pose and suppress autoplay and effects.
runtime_policy.cross_pack_rule: One animated scene globally; newest verified story state wins when anchors overlap.

scenes.label: Zoro exposes Whisky Peak's hundred-bounty-hunter trap

anchor.note: Local night-town theatre anchored to the existing Whisky Peak point.

scenes.label: Miss All Sunday reveals her power and offers another course

anchor.note: The Going Merry deck just after departing Whisky Peak; the atlas point is only a local theatre anchor.

scenes.label: Ace intervenes as Smoker closes on Luffy in Nanohana

anchor.note: Nanohana restaurant-street pursuit anchored to the existing port-city point.

scenes.label: Ace's Fire Fist destroys the Billions' five-ship convoy

anchor.note: The chapter-159 convoy clash occurs after leaving Nanohana; the existing port-city point is a local theatre anchor, not a measured river coordinate.

scenes.label: Luffy's ordinary attacks fail against Crocodile's sand body

anchor.note: The desert outskirts beyond Rainbase are staged at the existing Rainbase point; this replaces the earlier faceless Crocodile blockout.

scenes.label: Sanji reads Bon Clay's feint and wins the Ballet Kenpo duel

anchor.note: Sanji and Bon Clay's chapter-187 to 189 duel is staged at the existing Alubarna point.

scenes.label: Nami masters the first Clima-Tact against Miss Doublefinger

anchor.note: Nami's chapter-190 to 193 first Clima-Tact duel is staged at Alubarna and replaces Sanji/Bon Clay at the shared theatre.

scenes.label: Zoro hears the breath of steel and cuts Mr. 1

anchor.note: Zoro and Daz Bones' chapter-194 to 195 duel shares the Alubarna theatre and supersedes Nami/Miss Doublefinger when its corrected gate opens.

scenes.label: Aqua Luffy makes Crocodile's sand body tangible

anchor.note: The chapter-198 to 201 palace fight uses the existing Alubarna point as a local rooftop theatre and keeps the water-counter state separate from rounds one and three.

scenes.label: Luffy defeats Crocodile with the upward Gum-Gum Storm

anchor.note: The underground royal-tomb final uses the existing Alubarna point as its local theatre and replaces round two when chapter 203 opens.
